title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the practice of building sophisticated control layers around AI coding agents, comprising rules, skills, hooks, and subagents. The approach operates at two levels: single-session AI layer optimization and multi-session workflow orchestration. Cole Medin emphasizes that harness engineering, not model improvements, is the leverage point for scaling reliable agentic coding systems.
